title: maillardia borbonica
intro: Maillardia borbonica, also known as the Bourbon Island tree, is a species of tree in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to the island of Réunion and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Maillardia borbonica include reducing fever and treating various infections, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. The herbal preparations of Maillardia borbonica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
